title: from_uri calls parsed.path() twice; should use split_once
description: from_uri calls parsed.path().find('/') to get sep, then calls parsed.path() again to get the path reference and slices it with sep as the index. Two calls to the same method with one's result used as an index into the other's. Use split_once instead: let (service, account) = parsed.path().split_once('/').ok_or_else(|| SecretError::InvalidUri(...))?; This also allows dropping the manual empty-check restructuring into a single expression.
